meta.description: Comprehensive compliance rules for AgriBloom agricultural advisory system

safe_practices: Prefer integrated pest management (IPM) before chemical escalation.
Use crop-stage aware dose limits and observe pre-harvest intervals (PHI).
Recommend local agronomist escalation for severe spread (>30% infection).
Rotate pesticide modes of action to prevent resistance development.
Calibrate spray equipment regularly for accurate dosage.
Wear protective equipment: gloves, mask, goggles during application.
required_disclaimers: This advisory is AI-assisted and must be validated by your local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK).
Follow state-specific regulations and product label instructions strictly.
Observe pre-harvest interval (PHI) before harvesting treated crops.
Dispose of empty pesticide containers safely as per local guidelines.
Keep pesticides away from children, livestock, and water sources.

hi: यह सलाह AI-सहायता प्राप्त है और आपके स्थानीय कृषि विज्ञान केंद्र द्वारा सत्यापित होनी चाहिए।
राज्य-विशिष्ट नियमों और उत्पाद लेबल निर्देशों का सख्ती से पालन करें।
kn: ಈ ಸಲಹೆಯು AI-ಸಹಾಯಿತವಾಗಿದೆ ಮತ್ತು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಸ್ಥಳೀಯ KVK ಮೂಲಕ ಮಾನ್ಯಮಾಡಬೇಕು.
ರಾಜ್ಯ-ನಿರ್ದಿಷ್ಟ ನಿಯಮಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಉತ್ಪನ್ನ ಲೇಬಲ್ ಸೂಚನೆಗಳನ್ನು ಕಟ್ಟುನಿಟ್ಟಾಗಿ ಅನುಸರಿಸಿ.
te: ఈ సలహా AI-సహాయంతో ఉంది మరియు మీ స్థానిక KVK ద్వారా ధృవీకరించబడాలి.
రాష్ట్ర-నిర్దిష్ట నిబంధనలు మరియు ఉత్పత్తి లేబుల్ సూచనలను కఠినంగా అనుసరించండి.
ta: இந்த ஆலோசனை AI-உதவியுடன் உள்ளது மற்றும் உங்கள் உள்ளூர் KVK மூலம் சரிபார்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்.
மாநில-குறிப்பிட்ட விதிமுறைகள் மற்றும் தயாரிப்பு லேபிள் வழிமுறைகளை கண்டிப்பாக பின்பற்றுங்கள்.

icar_guidelines.spray_timing: Avoid spraying during flowering period to protect pollinators. Spray early morning or late evening.
icar_guidelines.water_interval: Maintain 24-48 hour interval between irrigation and pesticide spraying.
icar_guidelines.mixing_rules: Never mix more than 2 pesticides. Always test compatibility on a small area first.
icar_guidelines.weather_conditions: Do not spray if rain is expected within 6 hours or wind speed exceeds 15 km/hr.
icar_guidelines.re_entry_interval: Do not enter treated fields for at least 12-24 hours after pesticide application.
